overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dark rural village at night. The character approaches and ascends a stone stairway illuminated by campfire light, with dense forest and mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with scattered debris and cart wheels

events.description: passing a dead body or carcass lying on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a stone stairway, passing a dead body on the left side

entered.detail: massive dead tree with twisted branches silhouetted against the night sky
low stone wall running alongside the path
reddish carcass or dead body lying in the grass next to the path
warm orange glow from a fire behind the stone wall on the left
broken wooden wagon wheel lying on the ground
stone steps leading upward to an elevated area

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a nighttime walk along a dirt path in a rural village setting. The character approaches a stone stairway flanked by a large gnarled tree, passing a dead body and broken cart wheel along the way. Warm campfire light glows from behind a stone wall on the left, contrasting with the cool blue moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading to elevated village area

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone stairs
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the upper village area with wooden structures

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward a wooden shelter with a campfire burning in front

entered.detail: stone pillars framing the top of the stairway
open wooden structure with a sloped roof and a campfire burning in front
snow-capped rocky mountains visible in the distance beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone stairway flanked by stone walls, transitioning from the lower path to an elevated area. At the top, a wooden shelter with a burning campfire comes into view, with mountains visible in the distant background. The original campfire and large tree from the lower path are left behind as the character climbs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark rural village that ascends from a desolate path to an elevated lookout. It begins with a walk along a dirt road under cool blue moonlight, passing a dead body and a broken cart wheel beside a large gnarled tree. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a warm glow emanating from a campfire behind a stone wall, leading the camera toward a set of stone stairs. The perspective then climbs the stairway, leaving the lower village and the gnarled tree behind as the terrain rises. Finally, the shot opens up at the top of the stairs to reveal a wooden shelter with a burning campfire set against a backdrop of distant mountains.
